sequence.status_encoding: orange marks image-quality failure only, red marks depletion failure only, and alternating red-orange diagonal stripes mark simultaneous failure of both criteria

scope.state_model: Version 1 heating plus initial-density reabsorption with 2 E_rec per scattering cycle
scope.continuation: all 25 frames are rendered from the continued model state; frames beyond either screening limit are shown but are not counted as usable
scope.purpose: show how the single-frame quality and sequence-length results of Figures 5.1-5.3 appear in complete multiframe camera sequences
